text:
According to

http://www.freebsd.org/gnome/docs/porting.html


Well I have taken into consideration suggestions made by jgh and have
edited the Makefile to reflect proposed changes thats all and then add the .if define thing

.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>

and

 .include <bsd.port.post.mk>
